rules.description: Comparable located materially farther from subject than typical for the market (>1 mile default)
rules.citation: MI/Arch checklist: comparable distance vs. subject location

rules.description: Comp sale is stale relative to effective date

logic.source_logic: Flag if comp settlement/contract date is more than 12 months before AppraisalReportEffectiveDate

rules.citation: MI checklist: 'Did any of the comparables sell more than 12 months prior to the effective date?'

rules.description: All comparables selected are materially superior or inferior to subject (one-directional bias)

logic.source_logic: Flag if ComparableToSubjectDirectionType is the same direction (all 'Superior' or all 'Inferior') across every comp on a given characteristic line

rules.citation: MGIC training: 'Property value may be inflated when all comparables are significantly superior or inferior to the subject.'

rules.description: Fewer than 3 closed sales comparables reported without an explanation

logic.source_logic: Flag if count of Sales Comparable #n instances < 3 and no supplemental addendum/comment field populated

rules.citation: Fannie Mae B4-1.3-08/09: minimum comparable sufficiency to support value

rules.description: Comp weighting inconsistent with adjustment magnitude

logic.source_logic: Flag if ComparableWeightType marks a comp as most heavily weighted while it also carries the largest SalePriceNetTotalAdjustmentAmount among the set

rules.citation: CU FNM1011: 'CU indicates heightened overvaluation risk may result from the appraiser's weighting of adjusted sale prices.'

rules.description: Comp property type mismatch with subject use type

logic.source_logic: Flag if a Sales Comparable's improvement/property type materially differs from Subject's (e.g. subject SFR, comp is a PUD/condo) without adjustment

rules.citation: Fannie Mae B4-1.3-08: comparable sales should have similar physical and legal characteristics

rules.description: Rental comparable count insufficient for GRM support

logic.source_logic: Flag if Income Approach is used (GrossRentMultiplierFactorNumber populated) but fewer than 3 rental/GRM comparables reported

rules.citation: Standard income-approach sufficiency practice, mirrors sales-comparison minimum-comp guidance

rules.description: Comp settlement date after appraisal effective date

logic.source_logic: Flag if a comparable's SALES_HISTORY settlement date is later than AppraisalReportEffectiveDate (future/impossible market data)

rules.citation: Logical data-integrity check; parallels CU Data Integrity flag category

rules.description: Land/site comparable used for an improved subject without cost-approach cross-check

logic.source_logic: Flag if Land Comparable(s) are present but ValueIndicatedByCostApproachAmount is blank

rules.citation: Consistency check between comparable set used and approaches developed

rules.description: Same comparable address used as both a sales comparable and later disclosed as a prior sale of the subject

logic.source_logic: Flag if a comparable's address matches the subject's PriorSalesOrTransfersIndicator disclosure (possible self-comp / non-arm's-length reuse)

rules.citation: General appraisal-fraud pattern: comp reuse / related-party transaction masking

rules.description: Adjustment direction contradicts stated superiority/inferiority

logic.source_logic: Flag if a comp is marked superior (ComparableToSubjectDirectionType) on a feature but carries a positive dollar adjustment (should be negative), or vice versa

rules.citation: CU FNM0623/0624: 'the adjustment is in the wrong direction and is material relative to the comparable sales price'

rules.description: Net adjustment exceeds 15% of comparable sale price

logic.source_logic: Flag if abs(SalePriceNetTotalAdjustmentAmount) / comparable sale price > 15% without explanatory commentary

rules.citation: Widely-used investor/MI overlay threshold (MGIC training materials); FNMA Selling Guide removed a hard cap but underwriters must still evaluate 'extent of adjustments'

rules.description: Gross adjustment exceeds 25% of comparable sale price

logic.source_logic: Flag if sum of absolute value of all line-item COMPARABLE_ADJUSTMENT amounts / comparable sale price > 25%

rules.citation: Same source as CR-012; conventional gross-adjustment overlay

rules.description: Identical adjustment amount applied 'across the board' to every comparable

logic.source_logic: Flag if the same non-zero ComparableAdjustmentAmount for a given ComparableAdjustmentType repeats identically across all comps (rule-of-thumb, not market-derived)

rules.citation: MI checklist: flags 'across the board' adjustments for significant features; FNMA B4-1.3-09 prohibits rule-of-thumb adjustments

rules.description: GLA adjustment inconsistent with actual square-footage difference

logic.source_logic: Flag if the GLA adjustment amount doesn't scale proportionally with the reported GrossLivingAreaSquareFeet delta between subject and comp (e.g. large SF gap but zero/minimal adjustment)

rules.citation: CU FNM0623: GLA adjustment direction/materiality check

rules.description: Sales/financing concession present but not adjusted

logic.source_logic: Flag if SalesConcessionIndicator or TotalSalesConcessionAmount is populated on a comp's contract but no corresponding negative ComparableAdjustmentAmount is recorded

rules.citation: FNMA B4-1.3-09: 'Comparable sales that include sales or financing concessions must be adjusted'

rules.description: Positive adjustment applied for a sales/financing concession

logic.source_logic: Flag if a concession-related ComparableAdjustmentAmount is positive (increases value) rather than negative

rules.citation: FNMA B4-1.3-09: 'Positive adjustments for sales or financing concessions are not acceptable'

rules.description: Reconciliation section present but no narrative explaining comp weighting
rules.citation: FNMA B4-1.3-09 reconciliation-narrative requirement

rules.description: Quality or condition adjustment direction wrong relative to rating codes

logic.source_logic: Flag if subject's OverallQualityRatingCode/OverallConditionRatingCode indicates lower quality/condition than the comp, but the adjustment moves the wrong direction
logic.uad_fields_referenced: OverallQualityRatingCode, OverallConditionRatingCode (subject vs. comp); related adjustment amount

rules.citation: CU FNM0624: 'the quality adjustment is in the wrong direction and is material relative to the comparable sales price'

rules.description: Adjustment line item present with zero dollar amount and no supporting comment

logic.source_logic: Flag if a ComparableAdjustmentType line exists with ComparableAdjustmentAmount = 0 for a feature where subject/comp values visibly differ, and no VALUATION_COMMENTARY entry references it

rules.citation: FNMA B4-1.3-09: appraiser must comment on logic/reasoning for adjustments, including zero-adjustment decisions

rules.description: Builder incentives/options not reflected as a downward adjustment

logic.source_logic: Flag if subject shows newly-constructed / high option-package indicators without a corresponding market-support adjustment on comps lacking those options

rules.citation: MGIC training: builder options/personal property often don't recapture dollar-for-dollar in resale value

rules.description: Reconciled value falls outside the range of adjusted comparable sale prices

logic.source_logic: Flag if OpinionOfValueAmount is greater than the maximum or less than the minimum adjusted comparable sale price across all comps used
logic.uad_fields_referenced: OpinionOfValueAmount vs. min/max of adjusted comp sale prices

rules.citation: FNMA B4-1.3-09: 'the indicated value must be within the range of the adjusted sales price of the comparables'; CU: 'appraised value is above the range of adjusted comparable sales prices'

rules.description: Reconciled value supported by only a single comparable near the top/bottom of the range

logic.source_logic: Flag if OpinionOfValueAmount sits within a narrow band of only one comp's adjusted price while diverging materially from the others
logic.uad_fields_referenced: OpinionOfValueAmount vs. each comp's adjusted sale price

rules.citation: CU FNM0505/FNM0506: value near max/min adjusted comp price 'with support from only that comparable sale'

rules.description: Sales Comparison value materially diverges from Cost Approach value (>15%) without explanation
rules.citation: Standard multi-approach reconciliation practice

rules.description: Sales Comparison value materially diverges from Cost Approach value without explanation

logic.source_logic: Flag if abs(OpinionOfValueAmount - ValueIndicatedByCostApproachAmount) / OpinionOfValueAmount exceeds a threshold (e.g. 10-15%) and no reconciliation commentary addresses the gap

rules.citation: Standard appraisal-review practice: reconciliation must address material divergence between developed approaches

rules.description: Opinion of value equals purchase contract price exactly, with no independent support shown

logic.source_logic: Flag if OpinionOfValueAmount equals the subject's sales contract amount to the dollar and adjusted comp range spans a wider band (possible value-to-contract bias)
logic.uad_fields_referenced: OpinionOfValueAmount; SALES_CONTRACT_DETAIL contract amount; adjusted comp range

rules.citation: Documented appraisal-bias pattern; CU overvaluation-risk category covers value/contract alignment

rules.description: Reconciliation section present but no narrative explaining comp weighting

logic.source_logic: Flag if OpinionOfValueAmount is populated but VALUATION_RECONCILIATION_SUMMARY commentary field is empty

rules.citation: FNMA B4-1.3-09: appraiser's comments 'must reflect his or her reconciliation... and identify why the sale(s) were given the most weight'

rules.description: Final value indicates >10% variance from predominant/median value of neighborhood price range

logic.source_logic: Flag if OpinionOfValueAmount varies more than 10% from the subject's reported neighborhood predominant value without commentary

rules.citation: MI checklist: 'If value varies >10% from predominant value...'

rules.description: Income Approach GRM-derived value materially diverges from Sales Comparison value

logic.source_logic: Flag if income approach's implied value (GrossRentMultiplierFactorNumber x market rent) diverges >15% from OpinionOfValueAmount without reconciliation comment

rules.citation: Standard multi-approach reconciliation practice, mirrors CR-024

rules.description: Condition rating code outside the valid UAD C1-C6 enumeration
rules.citation: CU: quality/condition rating model-range validity

rules.description: Quality rating code outside the valid UAD Q1-Q6 enumeration
rules.citation: CU: quality/condition rating model-range validity

rules.description: Condition rating code outside the valid UAD C1-C6 enumeration

logic.source_logic: Flag if OverallConditionRatingCode/ExteriorConditionRatingCode/InteriorConditionRatingCode is not one of the defined UAD Appendix D values

rules.citation: CU: 'Verify that the quality rating is [in the] model range... per the UAD Appendix D quality definitions'

rules.description: C6 condition rating without a 'subject to repairs' scope indicator
rules.citation: Enact/MI checklist: C6 properties ineligible unless subject-to-repairs

rules.description: C6 condition rating without an eligibility/repair-contingency indicator

logic.source_logic: Flag if OverallConditionRatingCode = 'C6' and no 'subject to repairs' scope-of-work indicator is present (property ineligible as-is)

rules.citation: Enact/MI checklist: 'Properties in C6 condition are ineligible unless the appraisal is subject to repairs which correct all issues'

rules.description: Subject and comparable share the same condition/quality rating but no adjustment applied for observed differences

logic.source_logic: Flag if subject and comp both show e.g. C3, but VALUATION_COMMENTARY or adjustment amounts show no analysis of actual condition differences

rules.citation: FNMA Dec-2025 guidance: 'Even if the subject and comparables share the same rating, the appraiser is required to analyze and make adjustments based on actual quality and condition differences'

rules.description: Comparable quality rating differs from subject with no adjustment or explanation

logic.source_logic: Flag if a comp's OverallQualityRatingCode differs from subject's and no quality-line ComparableAdjustmentAmount / commentary addresses it

rules.citation: MI checklist: 'Do comparables have similar quality ratings? If no, is an explanation/adjustment provided?'

rules.description: Effective age substantially less than actual age without renovation commentary

logic.source_logic: Flag if EffectiveAgeYearsCount is materially lower than (AppraisalReportEffectiveDate year - PropertyStructureBuiltYear) and no renovation/upgrade commentary is present

rules.citation: Arch MI checklist: 'Is the effective age substantially less than the actual age? If yes, this should be justified in comments'

rules.description: Quality of construction rated Q6 (minimal/substandard) -- surfaces for underwriter review
rules.citation: Arch MI checklist: subject quality of construction substandard (Q6)

rules.description: Overall rating not holistically consistent with room-level condition/quality entries

logic.source_logic: Flag if OverallConditionRatingCode is materially better than the worst individual room/component condition captured elsewhere in the report

rules.citation: FNMA Dec-2025 guidance: ratings 'must be based on a holistic view... not just isolated upgrades'

rules.description: Quality of construction rated Q6 without corresponding eligibility flag

logic.source_logic: Flag if OverallQualityRatingCode = 'Q6' (minimal/substandard) — surfaces for underwriter review regardless of other findings

rules.citation: Arch MI checklist: 'Is the subject's quality of construction substandard (Q6)?'

rules.description: Zoning compliance not 'Legal' without a highest-and-best-use commentary
rules.citation: USPAP highest-and-best-use requirement; mirrors H-1 UAD1377/1378

rules.description: View rating differs materially between subject and comps without a view adjustment

logic.source_logic: Flag if subject ViewType indicates a premium view (water/mountain/city skyline) not shared by a comp, and no view-line adjustment is recorded

rules.citation: Standard grid-consistency practice; parallel to CD checklist items on unadjusted feature differences

rules.category: Prior Sales, Listing History & Property Flipping
rules.description: Subject resold within 90 days of prior acquisition at a materially higher price (FHA anti-flip window)

logic.source_logic: Flag if PriorSalesOrTransfersIndicator shows a transfer within 90 days of the current contract date and price increase exceeds a threshold
logic.uad_fields_referenced: PriorSalesOrTransfersIndicator / prior transfer date; current contract price vs. prior price

rules.citation: HUD: property resold within 90 days of acquisition is ineligible for FHA insurance absent an exemption

rules.category: Prior Sales, Listing History & Property Flipping
rules.description: Subject resold 91-180 days after acquisition exceeding the resale-percentage threshold

logic.source_logic: Flag if resale occurs 91-180 days after acquisition and price increase meets/exceeds HUD's ZIP-code-based resale-percentage threshold (second appraisal required)
logic.uad_fields_referenced: prior transfer date/price vs. current contract date/price

rules.citation: HUD: resale 91-180 days requiring a second appraisal when the resale-percentage threshold is met

rules.category: Prior Sales, Listing History & Property Flipping
rules.description: Prior sale/transfer of subject not disclosed despite recent MLS/public record activity pattern

logic.source_logic: Flag if PriorSalesOrTransfersIndicator is 'No'/blank but subject's DATA_SOURCE entries reference a recent transaction (cross-field inconsistency)

rules.citation: FNMA B4-1.3-07: 3-year subject sales history disclosure requirement

rules.category: Prior Sales, Listing History & Property Flipping
rules.description: Comparable prior sale/transfer not disclosed within the required 12-month lookback

logic.source_logic: Flag if a comp's PriorSalesOrTransfersIndicator omits a transfer that occurred within 12 months of its current sale date

rules.citation: FNMA B4-1.3-07: 12-month comparable sales history requirement; MGIC: appraiser must identify prior sales/listing activity

rules.description: Hazard zone identified without a corresponding valuation-impact commentary
rules.citation: Mirrors H-1 UAD1374/1375; extends to risk framing

rules.category: Prior Sales, Listing History & Property Flipping
rules.description: Adverse value trend in prior sales/listing history not addressed in commentary

logic.source_logic: Flag if subject or comp prior-sale price trend is declining and no VALUATION_COMMENTARY explanation is present

rules.citation: MGIC training: 'Adverse value trends need to be identified and explained'

rules.category: Prior Sales, Listing History & Property Flipping
rules.description: Comparable turnover / unsubstantiated value increase between successive sales

logic.source_logic: Flag if a comparable itself shows a prior sale within 12 months at a materially lower price with no explanation for the increase

rules.citation: MI checklist: 'Does the prior sale of the subject or comparables indicate an unsubstantiated increase in value or property turnover?'

rules.category: Prior Sales, Listing History & Property Flipping
rules.description: Appraisal effective date is more than 120 days old as of loan closing/note date without recertification

logic.source_logic: Flag if AppraisalReportEffectiveDate is >120 days prior to the note/closing date and no recertification-of-value indicator is present
logic.uad_fields_referenced: AppraisalReportEffectiveDate vs. note/closing date; recertification indicator

rules.citation: MGIC training: 'Appraisals with an effective date older than 120 days but within 12 months of the note date must be recertified for current value'; MI checklist: 'Is the appraisal no more than 120 days old as of the effective date?'

rules.category: Prior Sales, Listing History & Property Flipping
rules.description: Short time gap between comparable's listing date and sale date (motivated/rushed transaction indicator)

logic.source_logic: Flag if a comp's time-on-market (listing date to sale/contract date) is unusually short relative to typical market exposure

rules.citation: USPAP market-value definition requires 'reasonable time... allowed for exposure in the open market'; short exposure undermines arm's-length assumption

rules.category: Prior Sales, Listing History & Property Flipping
rules.description: Multiple comparables share the same buyer, seller, or entity name across transactions

logic.source_logic: Flag if PARTY names on comparable sales transactions repeat across two or more comps (possible related-party/investor-controlled sales pattern)

rules.citation: General appraisal-fraud/collusion pattern; parallels HUD's related-party flipping schemes

rules.description: Subject sale is non-arm's-length without required disclosure/adjustment analysis

logic.source_logic: Flag if the subject transaction type indicates a relationship between buyer/seller (e.g. family, employer, REO/short-sale) and no commentary addresses market-value applicability

rules.citation: USPAP market-value definition requires typically-motivated, unrelated parties; non-arm's-length sales require explicit analysis

rules.description: Seller-paid closing costs/concessions on subject contract not disclosed with an amount

logic.source_logic: Flag if SalesConcessionAmountKnownIndicator = true/known but TotalSalesConcessionAmount is blank

rules.citation: FNMA B4-1.3-09 concession-adjustment requirement; consistent completeness check

rules.description: Appraiser-borrower/lender independence indicator missing or flagged

logic.source_logic: Flag if PARTY relationship/role data suggests the appraiser has a business or personal relationship with the loan production side without an independence disclosure

rules.citation: HUD OIG: 'appraiser and mortgage broker having an undisclosed relationship jeopardizing the independence of the appraisal'

rules.description: Subject sale price identical to a very recent comparable's sale price (possible fabricated support)

logic.source_logic: Flag if the subject's SALES_CONTRACT price exactly matches a comparable's reported sale price to the dollar
logic.uad_fields_referenced: SALES_CONTRACT_DETAIL price vs. COMPARABLE sale price

rules.citation: General data-integrity/fraud-pattern check; parallels CU Data Integrity category

rules.description: Cash-equivalent financing not identified when comparable financing terms are atypical

logic.source_logic: Flag if a comp's financing type is non-conventional (seller financing, assumption) and no cash-equivalency adjustment/commentary is present
logic.uad_fields_referenced: financing type field on COMPARABLE; ComparableAdjustmentAmount (financing line)

rules.citation: FNMA B4-1.3-09: appraiser must recognize cash-equivalent sales and adjust atypical financing appropriately

rules.description: Multiple successive cash-out refinances on the subject in a short window

logic.source_logic: Flag if subject's transaction/ownership history shows repeated refinance activity within an abnormally short period

rules.citation: Fannie Mae 'Potential Red Flags for Mortgage Fraud': 'Multiple successive cash-out refinances'

rules.description: Appraised value inconsistent with a materially different prior appraisal or AVM on file

logic.source_logic: Flag if a prior valuation (if referenced/attached) diverges from current OpinionOfValueAmount beyond a reasonable variance without explanation

rules.citation: Fannie Mae fraud red-flags list: appraised value differs significantly from a prior or third-party value estimate

rules.description: Comparable selected shares an unusually close relationship to subject's transaction parties

logic.source_logic: Flag if a PARTY name tied to the comp transaction matches a PARTY name on the subject transaction (buyer, seller, agent)
logic.uad_fields_referenced: COMPARABLE transaction PARTY names vs. subject transaction PARTY names

rules.citation: General collusion/self-dealing pattern consistent with HUD OIG fraud schemes

rules.description: Sales concession amount unusually large relative to sale price

logic.source_logic: Flag if TotalSalesConcessionAmount / subject contract price exceeds a market-typical threshold (e.g. 6-9%) without commentary

rules.citation: FNMA B4-1.3-09: large concessions can still indicate a price reflecting more than real estate value if unadjusted

rules.description: REO/foreclosure/short-sale comparable used without market-condition adjustment

logic.source_logic: Flag if a comp is identified as REO/short-sale/foreclosure and no distressed-sale adjustment or commentary addresses atypical motivation

rules.citation: USPAP/market-value definition: distressed sales may not reflect typically-motivated buyer/seller behavior

rules.description: Appraisal fee or ordering party indicates AMC bypass / direct lender-to-appraiser assignment risk

logic.source_logic: Flag if PARTY roles show the assignment came directly from a loan production employee rather than an AMC/independent appraisal desk
logic.uad_fields_referenced: PARTY roles (ordering party vs. loan production)

rules.citation: Appraiser independence requirements (Dodd-Frank/AIR); HUD OIG undisclosed-relationship fraud pattern

rules.description: Zoning compliance marked 'legal nonconforming' or 'illegal' without a highest-and-best-use analysis

logic.source_logic: Flag if SiteZoningComplianceType is not 'Legal' and no VALUATION_COMMENTARY addresses highest-and-best-use / marketability impact

rules.citation: USPAP highest-and-best-use requirement; UAD Compliance rules already flag missing zoning-compliance commentary (H-1 UAD1377/1378 pattern)

rules.description: Hazard zone identified without a corresponding valuation-impact commentary

logic.source_logic: Flag if HazardZoneType is not 'None' and no VALUATION_COMMENTARY entry with ValuationAnalysisCategoryType='HazardZones' is present

rules.citation: Mirrors H-1 UAD1374/1375 pattern already in the ruleset; extends to a broader risk-detection framing

rules.description: Environmental condition proximity flagged as bordering/onsite without a market-impact adjustment

logic.source_logic: Flag if EnvironmentalConditionProximityType indicates 'Bordering' or 'Onsite' and no adjustment or discount is reflected in reconciliation

rules.citation: Mirrors H-1 UAD1294 pattern; extends to collateral-risk framing beyond simple disclosure

rules.description: Site influence (adverse) reported without a location/site adjustment applied

logic.source_logic: Flag if SiteInfluenceProximityType indicates an adverse influence (e.g. adjacent to commercial, high-traffic) and no location-line adjustment is present

rules.citation: Standard grid-consistency practice; extends UAD1330 pattern to risk detection

rules.description: Subject in a flood zone without required flood-insurance/disclosure commentary

logic.source_logic: Flag if HazardZoneType includes a flood-related enumeration and no commentary addresses flood insurance requirements/eligibility impact

rules.citation: FHA/GSE flood-zone eligibility and disclosure requirements

rules.description: Site size materially larger than neighborhood-typical without excess-land/highest-and-best-use analysis

logic.source_logic: Flag if subject SiteArea exceeds typical neighborhood lot size by a large margin and no excess-land analysis is present
logic.uad_fields_referenced: SiteArea (subject) vs. neighborhood-typical lot size; VALUATION_COMMENTARY

rules.citation: USPAP highest-and-best-use requirement for excess/surplus land

rules.category: Prior Sales, Listing History & Property Flipping
rules.description: Subject currently listed for sale at a price materially different (>10%) from the opinion of value
rules.citation: Active-listing consistency check

rules.description: View or site amenity claimed but contradicted by geospatial data

logic.source_logic: Flag if ViewType claims a premium view (e.g. waterfront) but LatitudeIdentifier/LongitudeIndicator place the parcel a significant distance from the claimed feature

rules.citation: Data-integrity cross-check pattern consistent with CU's aerial-imagery verification approach

rules.description: Legal description / parcel identifier inconsistent between subject and public-record data source

logic.source_logic: Flag if subject's parcel/legal description conflicts with DATA_SOURCE-reported public record identifiers
logic.uad_fields_referenced: subject legal description/parcel ID; DATA_SOURCE fields

rules.citation: Data Integrity flag category (CU); general identity/eligibility-misrepresentation fraud pattern (HUD OIG)

rules.description: Site utility type marked unavailable without a corresponding value/marketability commentary

logic.source_logic: Flag if a required SITE_UTILITY_DETAIL entry (electricity/water/sewer) is absent or marked unavailable and no commentary addresses habitability/marketability impact

rules.citation: Extends H-1 UAD1345-1347 pattern (utility presence) into a risk-impact framing

rules.description: Defect noted by appraiser with no corresponding action/repair-requirement flag

logic.source_logic: Flag if DEFECT_DETAIL contains an entry (infestation, dampness, settlement, structural) but no 'subject to inspection/repair' scope indicator is set

rules.citation: FNMA Dec-2025: defects flagged when 'appraiser noted an issue but lender didn't follow up' or 'said no action was needed'

rules.description: Evidence of infestation, dampness, or settlement noted without a specialist inspection reference

logic.source_logic: Flag if DEFECT_DETAIL references infestation/dampness/settlement keywords and no third-party inspection report reference is present

rules.citation: Arch MI checklist: 'Is there evidence of infestation, dampness or settlement? If yes, additional inspection reports may be needed'

rules.description: Roof condition marked non-observable without an alternate verification method noted

logic.source_logic: Flag if RoofObservableIndicator = false and no alternate roof-condition verification (comment, photo, prior report) is referenced

rules.citation: Extends H-1 UAD1074/roof-related pattern into a risk-detection framing

rules.description: Property description narrative indicates needed repairs but condition rating doesn't reflect it

logic.source_logic: Flag if VALUATION_COMMENTARY / defect text references needed repairs while OverallConditionRatingCode remains C1-C3 (better than deferred-maintenance would imply)

rules.citation: Arch MI checklist: 'Does the property description section indicate that repairs are needed?' cross-checked against rating

rules.description: Significant adverse physical/functional concern noted without value-impact discussion

logic.source_logic: Flag if a DEFECT_DETAIL or commentary entry describes a functional obsolescence issue (e.g. no legal bedroom egress, converted garage) without a reconciliation-impact discussion

rules.citation: Arch MI checklist: 'Are there significant adverse physical or functional concerns noted?'

rules.description: Manufactured home HUD data plate / certification fields incomplete on a manufactured-home subject

logic.source_logic: Flag if ConstructionMethodType = 'Manufactured' and MANUFACTURED_HOME_DETAIL certification fields are incomplete

rules.citation: Extends H-1 UAD1106 pattern (manufactured-home data-plate rule) into a broader completeness/eligibility risk framing

rules.description: Accessory dwelling unit present without confirmed legal/permitted status commentary

logic.source_logic: Flag if AccessoryDwellingUnitIndicator = true and no commentary addresses legal permitting/zoning status of the ADU

rules.citation: GSE ADU eligibility guidance requires legal-use confirmation for value inclusion

rules.description: Inspection date after the appraisal report effective date
rules.citation: Basic data-integrity/sequencing check

rules.description: Photos of subject basement/interior missing despite a claimed condition/defect rating requiring visual support

logic.source_logic: Flag if a defect or below-average condition rating is present but no corresponding IMAGE entries reference the relevant area

rules.citation: FNMA Dec-2025 guidance lists 'Subject photos (exterior and basement)' among areas commonly flagged for UAD 2.6/3.6 defect review

rules.description: Structural component (foundation/roof/HVAC) age or condition inconsistent with reported effective age

logic.source_logic: Flag if a specific STRUCTURE_COMPONENT_DETAIL shows an aged/deteriorated condition rating while overall EffectiveAgeYearsCount is reported as low

rules.citation: Extends FNMA Dec-2025 'holistic condition review' guidance to component-level consistency

rules.description: Inspection date after the appraisal report effective date

logic.source_logic: Flag if InspectionDate is later than AppraisalReportEffectiveDate (logically impossible sequencing)

rules.citation: Basic data-integrity/sequencing check; parallels CU Data Integrity flag category

rules.description: Effective date precedes the sales contract date on a purchase transaction

logic.source_logic: Flag if AppraisalReportEffectiveDate is earlier than the subject's SALES_CONTRACT contract date on a purchase-money assignment

rules.citation: Sequencing/scope-of-work consistency check

rules.description: Appraisal execution/signature date precedes the effective date

logic.source_logic: Flag if ExecutionDate on the appraiser's certification is earlier than AppraisalReportEffectiveDate

rules.citation: Basic certification-sequencing integrity check

rules.description: Reconsideration of Value (ROV) result date precedes the original effective date

logic.source_logic: Flag if ReconsiderationOfValueResultDate is earlier than AppraisalReportEffectiveDate

rules.citation: Extends H-1 UAD1756-style pattern into a general timeline-integrity framing

rules.description: Appraiser license expiration date precedes the appraisal effective date

logic.source_logic: Flag if any signing appraiser's LicenseExpirationDate is before AppraisalReportEffectiveDate (report signed under an expired license)

rules.citation: USPAP/state-board licensing-currency requirement; direct collateral/legal risk to loan file

rules.description: Comparable data-source effective date significantly predates its use in the report

logic.source_logic: Flag if DataSourceEffectiveDate for MLS/public-record data is materially older than AppraisalReportEffectiveDate without commentary on data currency

rules.citation: Data-currency practice consistent with DataSourceQualityRatingCode disclosure intent

rules.description: Multiple inspection dates recorded for the same property visit with inconsistent values

logic.source_logic: Flag if more than one INSPECTION_DETAIL entry exists for the subject with conflicting dates and no explanation (e.g. interior vs. exterior re-inspection)

rules.citation: Data-integrity/process-consistency check

rules.description: Appraisal report effective date falls on a date after the loan's rate-lock or commitment expiration

logic.source_logic: Flag if AppraisalReportEffectiveDate is later than a referenced commitment/rate-lock expiration date, if such a field is populated

rules.citation: Loan-file process-risk check, complements collateral timeline integrity

rules.description: Property inspection method inconsistent with certification type

logic.source_logic: Flag if PropertyInteriorInspectionMethodType/PropertyExteriorInspectionMethodType (e.g. 'Virtual'/'NoInspection') doesn't match the declared ValuationReportInspectionCertificationType

rules.citation: Extends H-1 UAD1512-1518 pattern (already identified in the prior ruleset audit) into the risk-detection framing

rules.description: Significant real property appraisal assistance disclosed without a corresponding certification statement

logic.source_logic: Flag if a SignificantRealPropertyAppraisalAssistance party is named but no certification/scope-of-work statement discloses the nature/extent of assistance

rules.citation: USPAP Standards Rule 2-3 certification requirement for assistance disclosure

rules.description: Comparable pool skewed toward a single listing agent/brokerage

logic.source_logic: Flag if 2+ comparables share the same listing/selling agent or brokerage PARTY reference without commentary on market representativeness

rules.citation: Comparable-independence best practice; parallels CU comparable-selection scrutiny

rules.description: Cost approach depreciation amount inconsistent with reported effective age/condition

logic.source_logic: Flag if COST_APPROACH_DETAIL depreciation figure doesn't scale with EffectiveAgeYearsCount/OverallConditionRatingCode

rules.citation: Standard cost-approach internal-consistency check

rules.description: Highest-and-best-use conclusion inconsistent with actual zoning/use classification

logic.source_logic: Flag if a highest-and-best-use narrative concludes a use inconsistent with SiteZoningComplianceType/current use

rules.citation: USPAP Standards Rule 1-3(b) highest-and-best-use analysis requirement

rules.description: Pool/spa or other amenity claimed without a corresponding permit or safety-compliance note

logic.source_logic: Flag if a pool/spa indicator is present without commentary addressing fencing/safety-code compliance where required by jurisdiction

rules.citation: Common QC checklist item for amenity-related liability/marketability risk

rules.description: Supervisory appraiser certification date precedes trainee/associate inspection date

logic.source_logic: Flag if a Supervisory Appraiser's ExecutionDate is earlier than the InspectionDate performed by the associate they are supervising

rules.citation: USPAP supervisory-appraiser certification sequencing requirement

rules.description: Room count (bedroom/bathroom) adjustment missing despite a reported count difference

logic.source_logic: Flag if subject and comp BedroomCount or FullBathroomCount differ but no corresponding ComparableAdjustmentAmount is recorded for that line

rules.citation: Standard grid-consistency practice; frequent MI/investor QC finding

rules.category: Prior Sales, Listing History & Property Flipping
rules.description: Subject withdrawn/expired listing shortly before appraisal without market-exposure commentary

logic.source_logic: Flag if a recent LISTING_INFORMATION entry shows a withdrawn/expired status close to the effective date with no commentary on marketing history relevance

rules.citation: MGIC training: appraiser must identify and address recent listing activity, including withdrawn/expired listings

rules.description: Subject within 300 ft of an airport/aerodrome

message.coaching: The subject is within 300 ft of an airport/aerodrome per public map data -- double-check your report addresses noise/flight-path impact on marketability.
message.audit: Live proximity lookup (OpenStreetMap aerodrome tag) places the subject within 300 ft of an airport. Confirm the report includes commentary or an adjustment addressing this influence.

rules._status: new -- not in Collateral_Risk_Rules_100_2026-07-10.xlsx, requires Kevin's sign-off before enabling

rules.description: Subject within 300 ft of a motorway/trunk/primary highway

message.coaching: The subject is within 300 ft of a major highway/busy road per public map data -- double-check your report addresses traffic noise or access impact on marketability.
message.audit: Live proximity lookup (OpenStreetMap motorway/trunk/primary tag) places the subject within 300 ft of a major road. Confirm the report includes commentary or an adjustment addressing this influence.

rules._status: new -- not in Collateral_Risk_Rules_100_2026-07-10.xlsx, requires Kevin's sign-off before enabling

rules.description: Subject within 300 ft of a high-voltage transmission line

message.coaching: The subject is within 300 ft of a high-voltage transmission line per public map data -- double-check your report addresses visual/marketability impact.
message.audit: Live proximity lookup (OpenStreetMap tagged power line with voltage) places the subject within 300 ft of a high-voltage line. Confirm the report includes commentary or an adjustment addressing this influence.

rules._status: new -- not in Collateral_Risk_Rules_100_2026-07-10.xlsx, requires Kevin's sign-off before enabling

rules.description: Subject within 300 ft of commercial/industrial land use

message.coaching: The subject is within 300 ft of commercial/industrial land use per public map data -- double-check your report addresses external-influence impact on marketability.
message.audit: Live proximity lookup (OpenStreetMap commercial/industrial landuse tag) places the subject within 300 ft of non-residential land use. Confirm the report includes commentary or an adjustment addressing this influence.

rules._status: new -- not in Collateral_Risk_Rules_100_2026-07-10.xlsx, requires Kevin's sign-off before enabling

rules.description: Delivery photo contains a detected face -- review for redaction/blur before delivery

message.coaching: This photo appears to contain a person's face (including a face in a framed photo on a wall counts). Consider redacting or blurring it before you deliver the report.
message.audit: Automated face detection (local, no third-party lookup -- bounding box only, no identity match) found a face-shaped region in this photo. Confirm the appraiser addressed redaction/blur before delivery.

rules._status: new -- Phase 3, requires Kevin's sign-off on wording before enabling; face-detection accuracy not yet validated against real property photos, see docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-10-collateral-risk-photo-checks-design.md open question 3

rules.description: Delivery photo is too dark to reliably evaluate

message.coaching: This photo is very dark -- consider retaking it so the condition of what it shows can actually be assessed.
message.audit: Automated brightness check flags this photo as too dark to reliably support a condition assessment. This is a photo-quality check, not a condition/damage finding.

rules._status: new -- Phase 2 (honestly-scoped photo-quality check, not damage detection -- see design doc 'Scope honesty'), requires Kevin's sign-off before enabling

rules.description: Delivery photo is too blurry to reliably evaluate

message.coaching: This photo appears out of focus -- consider retaking it so the condition of what it shows can actually be assessed.
message.audit: Automated blur check (Laplacian variance) flags this photo as too blurry to reliably support a condition assessment. This is a photo-quality check, not a condition/damage finding.

rules._status: new -- Phase 2 (honestly-scoped photo-quality check, not damage detection -- see design doc 'Scope honesty'), requires Kevin's sign-off before enabling
